name: Whiskas Adult Cat Pouch Chicken 85g
shortDescription: Nourish your cat with WHISKAS 1+ Chicken Adult Cat Food in Jelly, made with high-quality chicken and balanced nutrients to support muscle strength, immunity, and a glossy coat every meal packed with delicious goodness.
description: Treat your cat to the irresistible taste and balanced nutrition of WHISKAS 1+ Chicken Adult Cat Food in Jelly . Expertly prepared to lock in the natural flavour and goodness of high-quality ingredients, this delicious meal provides everything your adult cat needs to stay healthy, active, and satisfied every day. Each pouch is made with tender chicken pieces in a smooth jelly that cats love, delivering complete and balanced nutrition that supports strong muscles, natural defences, and a shiny coat. With sustainably sourced ingredients and a commitment to environmentally friendly production, WHISKAS ensures every meal is as good for your cat as it is for the planet. Key Benefits Complete & Balanced Nutrition: Made with 100% high-quality ingredients to meet all your cat’s daily needs. Supports Strong Muscles: High-quality animal protein helps maintain strength and vitality. Promotes Natural Defences: Enriched with Vitamin C to support immune health. Healthy Skin & Coat: Contains zinc to keep your cat’s skin soft and fur glossy. Sustainably Sourced: We’re dedicated to reducing our environmental impact 85% of our European factories use renewable electricity, with a goal of reaching 100% by 2025. Ingredients Meat and Animal Derivatives (35%, including 4% Chicken in the Chunk), Cereals, Minerals, Derivatives of Vegetable Origin, Various Sugars. *Chunk typically 40% of product. Nutritional Information Analytical Constituents (%): Protein 7.8 | Fat 4.0 | Inorganic Matter 1.6 | Crude Fibre 0.25 | Moisture 84.5 Additives per kg: Nutritional Additives: Vitamin C (702 mg), Vitamin D₃ (200 IU), Taurine (620 mg), Copper (1.2 mg), Iodine (0.22 mg), Iron (11.2 mg), Manganese (2.2 mg), Zinc (16.2 mg) Technological Additives: Cassia gum (2148 mg) Sensory Additives: Flavourings Feeding Guidelines Adjust feeding portions according to your cat’s age, weight, and activity level. Serve at room temperature and always provide fresh drinking water. Diet Transition Transition gradually over 7 days: Days 1–2: 25% new food / 75% old food Days 3–4: 50% new / 50% old Days 5–6: 75% new / 25% old Day 7+: 100% new food Keep mealtimes consistent and monitor your cat’s appetite and digestion. Consult your vet if you notice any changes. Storage Instructions Store unopened pouches in a cool, dry place. Once opened, refrigerate unused portions and serve within 24 hours. Why Choose WHISKAS 1+ Chicken in Jelly Made with tender chicken for irresistible flavour Balanced nutrition for adult cats aged 1 year and above Enriched with vitamins and minerals for total wellbeing Supports immunity, skin health, and muscle strength Environmentally responsible production
